name: 平衡树

metadata.description: 平衡树: Balanced trees maintain height balance through rotation or recoloring operations, ensuring O(log n) operation time. For a coding/programming concept, here is a brief Python code example using the AVL tree (a type of balanced binary search tree): ```python class TreeNode: def __init__(self, key): self.key = key self.left = None self.right = None self.height = 1 class AVLTree: def insert(self, root, key): # Normal BST insertion if not root: return TreeNode(key) elif key < root.key: root.left = self.insert(root.left, key) else: root.right = self.insert(root.right, key) # Update the height of this ancestor node root.height = 1 + max(self.getHeight(root.left), self.getHeight(root.right)) # Get the balance factor balance = self.getBalance(root) # If unbalanced, then there are 4 cases # Left Left Case if balance > 1 and key < root.left.key: return self.rightRotate(root) # Right Right Case if balance < -1 and key > root.right.key: return self.leftRotate(root) # Left Right Case if balance > 1 and key > root.left.key: root.left = self.leftRotate(root.left) return self.rightRotate(root) # Right Left Case if balance < -1 and key < root.right.key: root.right = self.rightRotate(root.right) return self.leftRotate(root) return root def leftRotate(self, z): y = z.right T2 = y.left y.left = z z.right = T2 z.height = 1 + max(self.getHeight(z.left), self.getHeight(z.right)) y.height = 1 + max(self.getHeight(y.left), self.getHeight(y.right)) return y def rightRotate(self, z): y = z.left T3 = y.right y.right = z z.left = T3 z.height = 1 + max(self.getHeight(z.left), self.getHeight(z.right)) y.height = 1 + max(self.getHeight(y.left), self.getHeight(y.right)) return y def getHeight(self, root): if not root: return 0 return root.height def getBalance(self, root): if not root: return 0 return self.getHeight(root.left) - self.getHeight(root.right) # Example usage: avl_tree = AVLTree() root = None keys = [9, 5, 10, 0, 6, 11, -1, 1, 2] for key in keys: root = avl_tree.insert(root, key) ``` This example demonstrates the basic operations of an AVL tree, including insertion and rotation.

summary: 平衡树是二叉树的一种重要变体，旨在通过自动调整树的结构来保持树的高度平衡，从而确保查找、插入和删除操作的时间复杂度维持在 O(log n)。该分支涵盖 AVL 树、红黑树和 B 树三种主要类型。AVL 树是严格平衡的二叉搜索树，通过旋转操作维持左右子树高度差不超过 1，适合查询频繁的场景；红黑树是一种近似平衡的二叉搜索树，通过颜色约束和旋转实现平衡，插入和删除效率较高，广泛应用于 Java 的 TreeMap、C++ 的 map 等标准库；B 树是一种多路平衡查找树，专为磁盘等块存储设备设计，通过增加每个节点的子节点数来减少树的高度，常用于数据库索引和文件系统。三者从严格平衡到近似平衡再到多路平衡，体现了不同应用场景下对平衡性与操作效率的权衡。学习路径建议从 AVL 树入手理解旋转机制，再过渡到红黑树的颜色规则和插入删除算法，最后学习 B 树的节点分裂与合并，从而全面掌握平衡树的设计思想与实际应用。
example_queries: AVL 树和红黑树在插入和查找性能上有什么区别？
如何实现红黑树的左旋和右旋操作？
B 树在数据库索引中为什么比二叉搜索树更高效？
给定一组数据，如何构建一棵平衡的 AVL 树？
红黑树中插入节点后如何通过颜色调整和旋转保持平衡？
